rani_lakshmibai_of_jhansi.ref_desc: Rani Lakshmibai appears as a mid-20s athletic Maratha queen with a heart-shaped wheatish face, long braided black hair under a deep saffron nauvari sari, dark indigo choli, brown leather belts and boots, minimal gold jewellery, and a steel talwar in a brown scabbard.

chhatrapati_shivaji_maharaj.ref_desc: Shivaji Maharaj is a mid-30s compact warrior with wheatish skin, pointed black beard, white turban, white angarkha, off-white trousers, saffron sash, dark green sleeveless waistcoat, brown mojari shoes, and a steel talwar at his left hip with white, saffron, dark green, brown, and gold accents.

emperor_ashoka.ref_desc: Emperor Ashoka appears as a mid-30s broad-shouldered Mauryan ruler with an oval bearded face, black topknot and simple gold circlet, deep red tunic, off-white dhoti, pale saffron shawl, minimal gold jewellery, brown sandals, and a plain curved sword at his left hip.

rajendra_chola_i.ref_desc: Rajendra Chola I is a tall, medium-brown warrior-king with a high black topknot, gold forehead chain, deep-red angavastram, white veshti with gold border, gold ornaments, leather sandals, and a curved Chola steel sword in a dark brown scabbard, using red, white, gold, brown, and black tones.

tatya_tope.ref_desc: Tatya Tope is a lean mid-30s Maratha general with wheatish skin, sharp features, a prominent moustache, black hair under an off-white turban, wearing an off-white angarkha and dhoti with a maroon sash and beige shawl, carrying a brass-hilted talwar in a brown scabbard.

british_cavalry_officer_1858.ref_desc: A lean late-twenties British hussar officer with dark side-whiskers, short dark brown hair under a navy forage cap, wearing a dark blue gold-braided hussar tunic, blue breeches with gold stripe, black riding boots, and a brass-hilted sabre at his left hip.

sir_hugh_rose.ref_desc: Sir Hugh Rose is a stern blue-grey-eyed British general with receding grey hair under a dark navy peaked cap, wearing a dark navy frock coat with scarlet piping, khaki trousers, black boots, a brown sword belt, and carrying a brass-guard 1822 officer’s sword in a steel scabbard, with navy, scarlet, khaki, black, and brass tones.

mahipala_the_pala_king.ref_desc: Mahipala is a tall, broad-shouldered, early-40s Pala king with medium-brown skin, black hair in a high topknot held by a gold circlet, maroon silk tunic, gold-yellow over-tunic, off-white dhoti, green shawl, gold jewellery, sandals, and a curved sword in a brown scabbard with red-wrapped hilt.

aurangzeb_the_mughal_emperor.ref_desc: Aurangzeb Alamgir is a tall, lean, late-40s Mughal emperor with a narrow bearded face and stern dark eyes, wearing a white conical turban with green band, ivory patterned jama, maroon quilted waistcoat, emerald-green sash, dark churidar and mojari, and carrying a plain-hilted talwar in a brown scabbard with an ivory–green–maroon–gold–brown palette.

hiroji_farzand.ref_desc: Hiroji Farzand is a lean mid-20s Maratha with wheatish complexion, short moustache and small beard, saffron pagri over a low hair-knot, off-white angarkha, bottle-green quilted sleeveless waistcoat, cream churidar, brown mojari and a plain dark-brown-sheathed talwar on a red-and-gold sash.

mangal_pandey.ref_desc: Mangal Pandey is a lean mid-20s sepoy with an oval medium-brown face, dark intense eyes, black hair in a low bun with loose temples, wearing an off-white kurta under a red Bengal Infantry coatee, white churidar trousers, dark blue sash, brown boots, and carrying a long Brown Bess-style flintlock musket with fixed bayonet in a palette of deep red, off-white, dark blue, brown leather, and brass.

bahadur_shah_zafar.ref_desc: Elderly, thin Bahadur Shah Zafar with a long wrinkled face, white mustache and beard, wearing a deep green silk Mughal jama, cream churidar and shawl, brown mojari shoes, a tall crimson turban with a green jewel, and a plain leather-sheathed shamshir at his left side.

kunwar_singh.ref_desc: Elder Kunwar Singh has an oval weathered brown face with grey mustache and beard, long grey hair in a low knot under an off‑white turban, wearing an off‑white angarkha, olive quilted sleeveless coat, white churidar, dark maroon sash, brown mojari, right forearm bandage, and a curved talwar in a dark brown scabbard at his left side with off‑white, dark maroon, olive green, dark brown and beige colours.

bal_gangadhar_tilak.ref_desc: Bal Gangadhar Tilak is a medium-built late-middle-aged Maharashtrian man with a calm, intense face, black-grey mustache, deep-set eyes, wearing a red Puneri pagadi, off-white kurta and dhoti, dark indigo shawl, brown chappals, and carrying a brown leather notebook with pen.

lala_lajpat_rai.ref_desc: Lala Lajpat Rai is a medium-built, sixtyish man with a mustard-cream khadi turban, oval medium-brown face with a grey-black moustache, off-white kurta and churidar under a beige angarkha coat, a deep charcoal-brown shawl with maroon-striped border, brown leather shoes, and a rolled Tribune newspaper in his right hand.

bagha_jatin_jatindranath_mukherjee.ref_desc: Bagha Jatin is a tall, broad-shouldered man in his early 30s with medium-brown skin, short black hair combed back, a neat moustache, wearing an off-white khadi kurta, beige dhoti, simple sandals, a light gamchha, and carrying a dark-wood bolt-action rifle on a brown strap.

khudiram_bose.ref_desc: Khudiram Bose is a slim 17-year-old Bengali youth with short slightly wavy black hair, medium-brown skin, large determined dark eyes, wearing an off-white khadi kurta, cream Bengali-style dhoti with a thin maroon border, light-brown gamchha over his left shoulder, bare feet, and a brown leather cross-body satchel with a brass buckle and a wrapped paper packet protruding, in a palette of off-white, cream, light brown, maroon, and black.

rajaraja_chola_i.ref_desc: Rajaraja Chola I is a tall, muscular, medium-brown man with an oval face, arched brows, ash-and-red tilak, long black hair in a high topknot with a gold circlet and white tie, wearing a deep-maroon angavastra, cream veshti with maroon-gold border, simple gold ornaments, brown sandals, and carrying a plain curved steel sword with wooden hilt in a brown leather scabbard, with maroon, cream, gold, dark brown and black as dominant colours.

ainnurruvar_manigramam_merchant_guilds_a.figure: Ainnurruvar/Manigramam merchant guilds and Chola-era trade
ainnurruvar_manigramam_merchant_guilds_a.ref_desc: A lean Tamil merchant in his early 40s with an oval medium-brown face, short beard, low-knot black hair and simple off-white turban strip, wearing maroon angavastram, off-white tunic, cream veshti, dark indigo waist-sash, leather sandals, modest gold and bead jewellery, carrying a curved iron merchant’s scale and palm-leaf ledger in maroon, off-white, cream, dark indigo and dark brown tones.

chola_bronze_artisans_and_temple_patrons.figure: Chola bronze artisans and temple patrons
chola_bronze_artisans_and_temple_patrons.ref_desc: Manikkam of Thanjai is a lean late-20s Chola bronze artisan with warm medium-brown skin, oval face, center-parted black hair in a low bun under an ochre headband, wearing an off-white veshti with deep-maroon border, reddish-brown angavastram, minimal copper and bronze ornaments, and carrying a soot-darkened bronze pouring ladle and a small wax dancing-deity model in warm bronze tones.
